text: Under predictors-ON the policy forward is only 3–14% of the agent-day (transformers ~4%; h1024 LSTM 14% @1t, 8% @6t) — the LightGBM predictor+scorer floor is the rest.
GPU batch=1 loses for every arch except the FLOP-bound h1024 LSTM (the rest are launch-bound; transformers run 1.5–2× slower on CUDA).
The box is CPU-core-bound at N=16; --big-model-threads 6 oversubscribes 20 cores and is net-negative, so revert to --big-model-threads 1.
